pulseaudio.on-scroll-up: bash -c 'v=$(pactl get-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ | grep -oP "\d+(?=%)" | head -1); s=$(( (v/5)*5 )); pactl set-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ $(( s+5 ))%'
pulseaudio.on-scroll-down: bash -c 'v=$(pactl get-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ | grep -oP "\d+(?=%)" | head -1); s=$(( (v/5)*5 )); [ $s -lt $v ] && pactl set-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ ${s}% || pactl set-sink-volume @DEFAULT_SINK@ $(( s-5 ))%'
pulseaudio.on-click: kitty --title pulsemixer -e pulsemixer & hyprctl dispatch focuswindow title:pulsemixer
